evals.prompt: 为llama.cpp实现ggml_gemv_q5_0_q8_0算子的RISC-V RVV向量化，向量寄存器512bit
evals.expected_output: Agent reads applications/llama.cpp/README.md, analyzes cross-platform implementations, creates rvv-patches directory with .inl/.patch/.test/README files following convention, tests pass, gap analysis report generated

evals.prompt: I need to vectorize vec_dot_q6_K_q8_K for RISC-V RVV in applications/llama.cpp. VLEN=512.
evals.expected_output: Agent follows all 8 phases: research, analyze ARM/x86 implementations, create RVV kernel in .inl format, create test.cpp with scalar reference, generate patch.diff, run tests, gap analysis, PDF report

evals.prompt: 对applications/yolo中的softmax_fp16算子实现RVV向量化，VLEN=512。这个应用还没有rvv-patches目录，需要先建立。
evals.expected_output: Agent discovers that rvv-patches/ doesn't exist, creates it with _template/ based on convention, then implements softmax_fp16 operator following the standard layout
